sections.paragraph:
נדף fut. יִנְדֹּף Psa 68:3, and יִדֹּף Psa 1:4 to dispel, to drive away, as the wind drives away chaff, stubble, smoke, Psa 1:4 68:3 to put to flight an enemy, i.e. to conquer, metaph. Job 32:13.

Niphal נִדַּף

pass. to be driven away, Isa 41:2 Psa 68:3 עָלֶה נִדָּף a leaf driven by the wind, Levit. 26:36 Job 13:25 inf. constr. הִנְדֹּף Psa 68:3.
